scripts.zip: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/scwa-zip && mkdir -p /tmp/scwa-zip/surecart-whatsapp-notifications && rsync -rc --exclude-from=.distignore . /tmp/scwa-zip/surecart-whatsapp-notifications && cd /tmp/scwa-zip && zip -r surecart-whatsapp-notifications.zip surecart-whatsapp-notifications && mv surecart-whatsapp-notifications.zip $OLDPWD/ && rm -rf /tmp/scwa-zip
